name: Mulligans at the Bluffs
about: Mulligans at the Bluffs is a golf and entertainment venue located in Gaylord, Michigan, offering a unique combination of indoor golf technology and a full-service kitchen and bar. The facility features seven high-tech golf simulators that allow players to experience world-famous courses like Pebble Beach and St. Andrews year-round, regardless of weather conditions. Beyond golf, the venue provides a social atmosphere with massive screens for watching sports, including private viewing party options, and a robust menu of food and cocktails.
why_golfers_like_it: Full bar and restaurant menu available in bays
Spacious bays accommodating up to 6 players

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen serving burgers, pub favorites, and snacks; curated by Executive Chef.
Extensive beer menu featuring local and international brews, plus signature cocktails.

simulator_hardware.notes: Overhead-mounted launch monitor with massive ball-capture range.

amenities_list: Full Service Bar|Restaurant|Private Events|Club Rentals|Mini Golf|Outdoor Games|Heated Patio|Sports Viewing

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you do not need to bring your own clubs. Mulligans provides a wide selection of high-quality TaylorMade rental sets for men, women, and kids, including drivers through putters.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. Mulligans operates as a golf tavern and restaurant with a full kitchen and bar service available directly to your simulator bay or table.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally, one person can finish 18 holes in about 45 minutes to an hour on the simulators. Two people playing together can typically play 9 holes in an hour.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly. However, there is a minimum age requirement of 10 years old to use the golf simulators, and minors must be accompanied by an adult.
